descriptionParagraphs: Politicians : 100 caricatures of China, Taiwan & Hong Kong / Qi qing shang mian : Zhong Gang Tai yi bai zheng zhi ren wu man xiang is a book by Zunzi. The source page records removal or withholding in public libraries amid the post-2020 tightening of Hong Kong's public reading infrastructure.

Even with sparse bibliographic metadata, the work is interesting because its very availability became part of a struggle over Hong Kong's public sphere. As a book, it can be read not only for subject matter but for the way form, tone, and circulation make a text feel dangerous, intimate, or politically usable to anxious officials.

It also matters as part of a wider censorship history in Hong Kong. The present page is a dossier starter built from source-tracked ban records; the surviving note currently says: The source page records removal or withholding in public libraries amid the post-2020 tightening of Hong Kong's public reading infrastructure. More publication history, translations, and close reading can be added later.

In the current dossier, the main state objections cluster around national security and political dissent.

The earliest event currently captured here is 2023-05-12 in Hong Kong, where Hong Kong public libraries and other government-managed collections removed from government-managed collections. counterReadings.title: The Origins of Totalitarianism
counterReadings.author: Hannah Arendt
counterReadings.note: A foundational analysis of state terror, propaganda, and ideological conformity.

counterReadings.title: On Tyranny
counterReadings.author: Timothy Snyder
counterReadings.note: A short modern guide to resisting authoritarian politics and controlled public discourse.

counterReadings.title: 100 Banned Books: Censorship Histories of World Literature
counterReadings.author: Nicholas J. Karolides, Margaret Bald, and Dawn B. Sova
counterReadings.note: A compact reference on how censorship systems moved across states, churches, and courts.

counterReadings.title: Banned Books: 387 B.C. to 1978 A.D.
